title: Debris Of Fortune
description: Ancient Debris Drops Netherite Scraps when mined instead of the block. Fortune also functions with it.
body:
# Summary

### Fortune + Ancient Debris = Many Netherite Scrap

**This Datapack/Mod makes Ancient Debris drop Netherite Scrap instead of the block.**

**The block can still be obtained via silk touch.**

Netherite is crafted as normal
